title: Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity Act of 2025
short_title: Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill would let people carry hidden guns in other states if they are already allowed to carry them in their home state. To do this, they must be legally allowed to own guns under federal law and carry a photo ID. They also need either a valid concealed carry permit from their state or be legally allowed to carry hidden guns in their home state. The person must follow the gun laws of whatever state they are visiting. The law would start working ninety days after it is signed.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
subjects: Wilderness and natural areas, wildlife refuges, wild rivers, habitats

sections.title: Section 1  Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity Act of twenty twenty five.

sections.title: Section 2  Reciprocity for the Carrying of Certain Concealed Firearms
sections.text: This section adds a new law to the federal gun laws. The new law says that if you are legally allowed to carry a hidden handgun in your home state, you can also carry it hidden in other states under certain conditions. You must have a photo ID issued by the government and either a valid permit from your home state or be legally allowed to carry without a permit in your home state. You can only carry in states that either give permits to their own residents or do not ban hidden guns for lawful purposes. You cannot carry machine guns or destructive devices. When you carry in another state, you must follow all the same rules that apply to residents of that state who carry hidden guns. If a state lets permit holders have different levels of restrictions, you get to carry with the same freedom as someone with an unrestricted permit. This law does not change how states issue their own permits. If any part of this law is found to violate the Constitution, the rest of the law will still be in effect. The law will start working ninety days after it is signed.
